curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff which modified two source files: MSTestReportConverter.java (containsData and getDocumentBuilder functions) and XslTransformer.java (constructor). The patch adds XXE protection by disabling DTD processing, external general/parameter entities, and setting secure processing features on DocumentBuilderFactory and TransformerFactory. No sibling files in the same directory use XML parsing APIs, so no additional locations were added. Pre-assigned vulnerability class 'xxe' confirmed by CWE-611/CWE-776 and the patch content.
